cache_timeout.description: Duration (in seconds) of the caching timeout for this chart. Note this defaults to the datasource/table timeout if undefined.

certified_by.description: Person or group that has certified this chart

changed_on.description: The ISO date that the chart was last changed.

description.description: A description of the chart propose.

description_markeddown.description: Sanitized HTML version of the chart description.

form_data.description: Form data from the Explore controls used to form the chart's data query.
